speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. The four of you, I need you to roll stealth checks, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Glancing about, you can see the track marks of everyone fleeing. You can see the spatters of blood. You can see the place where the transformation occurred. There is a horrible shedding of certain layers of flesh. You can see previously existing layers of flesh and muscle that were shed as whatever this undead thing was fell to the ground. Once again, you make a religion check as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Roll high. I did not. Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. This is not your specialty. You have little experience with the undead and this type of magic.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We can't spend that long in here. Maybe we just take a bit of it with us. Do you have a pocket?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have many pockets, of course I have pockets.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like a jar? I-I got no pockets!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You designed a character with no pockets?! Why would you do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There's no pockets! All right, but I'll check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He's just in the Blue Man Group unitard and that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure Rob Liefeld just got a nosebleed and he doesn't know why.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So this dead thing is here in front of me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two of them. There's the main one, the ground zero one, which is where you were putting all your attention, and then there's the woman, who was transformed as part of the first.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will take my dagger, and I will slice a little bit off of the woman, and it's going to get dark in here and I will snuff out the light and use the rag to roll it up and I'll put the little piece in my pack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With a squishy sound you place it within your pack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's get out of here, I'm going to be sick.
